mnemonics: S.P.A.C.E.S. Separators: Semicolons, Parentheses, Angle brackets, Curly braces, Ellipsis, Square brackets
keyPoints: Separators are special characters that define the structure of Java code
Each separator has a specific purpose: semicolons end statements, parentheses group expressions, curly braces define blocks, etc.
commonMistakes: Forgetting semicolons at the end of statements
Mismatching curly braces, parentheses, or brackets
Using commas instead of periods in package names
